top_signals.title: Saudi Arabia Crude Oil Exports Hit Lowest on Record in April
top_signals.summary: Crude oil exports from Saudi Arabia fell for a second straight month in April to a record low, according to Joint Organizations Data Initiative (JODI) data released on Monday, as the Iran war disrupted shipments from the Gulf region.Exports…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Prices Fall 4% as US-Iran Talks Ease Supply Risks
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell 4% on Monday after U.S. Vice President JD Vance said progress has been made in talks with Iran and that the Strait of Hormuz was open, easing supply concerns.Brent crude was down $3.18 or 3.95%, at $77.39 a barrel by 11:44 a.m.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tech Tumble Overshadows Markets' Iran Hopes | The Asia Trade 6/23/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore inflation holds at 1.8% in May, cooler than expected as services costs ease
top_signals.summary: Core inflation, which strips out accommodation and private transport costs, came in at 1.4%
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Tackling EV trucks after success with cars
top_signals.summary: Beijing's latest push into electric trucks has echoes of measures announced more than a decade ago to develop new energy passenger cars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump signs orders to build a quantum computer and protect against the one that could break encryption
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
